summary: Comprehensive testing of HRMS Jobs 1-7 completed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components and interactions verified.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

features_tested.JOB_1_datetime_picker_admin: PASS - Admin missed punch form uses datetime-local inputs for Check-in/Check-out
features_tested.JOB_1_datetime_picker_employee: PASS - Employee missed punch form uses datetime-local inputs
features_tested.JOB_2_paginated_response: PASS - GET /api/missed-punches returns {data, total, page, per_page}
features_tested.JOB_2_filter_from_date: PASS - from_date query param works correctly
features_tested.JOB_2_filter_to_date: PASS - to_date query param works correctly
features_tested.JOB_2_filter_status: PASS - status query param filters correctly
features_tested.JOB_2_pagination_controls: PASS - page and per_page params work correctly
features_tested.JOB_2_admin_ui_filters: PASS - Admin page shows From/To date pickers, Status dropdown, Employee search
features_tested.JOB_2_admin_ui_pagination: PASS - Admin page shows pagination controls (Total records, per page selector, page navigation)
features_tested.JOB_3_approve_updates_attendance: PASS - Approving missed punch creates/updates attendance record with first_punch/last_punch
features_tested.JOB_4_duplicate_missed_punch: PASS - Duplicate missed punch (same employee + date + punch_type) returns 400
features_tested.JOB_4_duplicate_late_request: PASS - Duplicate late request (same employee + date) returns 400
features_tested.JOB_4_duplicate_early_out: PASS - Duplicate early out request (same employee + date) returns 400
features_tested.JOB_4_duplicate_leave: PASS - Duplicate leave request (same employee + overlapping dates) returns 400
features_tested.JOB_5_leave_apply_fix: PASS - Employee leave apply works successfully (no NameError)
features_tested.JOB_6_sick_leave_rule: PASS - Sick leave with future date returns 400 (past/current only)
features_tested.JOB_6_casual_leave_rule: PASS - Casual leave with less than 4 working days returns 400
features_tested.JOB_6_emergency_leave_rule: PASS - Emergency leave with any date succeeds
features_tested.JOB_6_leave_hints_ui: PASS - Leave form shows type-specific hints (Sick/Casual/Emergency rules)
features_tested.JOB_6_date_constraints_ui: PASS - Date inputs have appropriate min/max constraints based on leave type
features_tested.JOB_7_single_leave_per_day: PASS - Two leaves on same date returns 400
features_tested.backward_compat_time_format: PASS - Old missed punch records with time-only format display correctly

critical_code_review_comments: All 7 jobs implemented correctly with proper validation
Duplicate prevention uses status != 'rejected' check to allow resubmission after rejection
Leave rules properly enforce: Sick=past/current, Casual=4 working days (excl Sunday), Emergency=any
Attendance update helper correctly handles datetime-local format (extracts time from YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM)
Pagination implemented with proper total count and skip/limit logic
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing includes missed punch requests, late requests, early out requests, and leave requests with TEST_ prefix pattern for various dates
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 HRMS jobs tested and working. Key features: (1) datetime-local inputs for missed punch, (2) paginated missed punch API with filters, (3) attendance auto-update on missed punch approval, (4) duplicate prevention for all request types, (5) leave apply bug fixed, (6) leave type rules enforced, (7) single leave per day rule. Employee user 'user/user' is linked to employee 'Venkata Chaithanya Y'. Casual leave min date is 4 working days from today (excluding Sundays).
